world_name: World of Darkness - Vampire: The Masquerade
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: World of Darkness / Vampire: The Masquerade inspired gothic-punk horror atlas for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast black sea gothic-punk world of many island groups and microcontinents under eternal night, vampire clan domain islands, Elysium city-isles, haunted cemetery islands, sewer-warren ports, cathedral spire cities, fog-filled midnight parks, Anarch havens, Camarilla courts, Sabbat war-isles, occult wilderness and blood-moon coastlines.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated gothic vampire atlas, noir cartography, dark parchment, silver ink, deep crimson accents, fog and shadows, ornate gothic border, domain territory markings, political horror mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; include large gothic city islands, tiny haunted islets, crescent island arcs, black lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, fragmented cliffs and microcontinents with no grid-like spacing; include black compass rose, sea routes, clan-domain boundary shading, cemetery icons, Elysium symbols and hidden sewer-route traces without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in size and shape, with realistic complex coastlines, broken shores, curved bays, peninsulas, foggy deltas, dark estuaries, cliff coasts and storm harbors; show many climates and regions including old forests, moors, mountains, wetlands, snowfields, plague-dark farmlands, ruined cities and haunted coastal harbors.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, bright heroic fantasy, cheerful tropical palette, modern tourist map, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
